# userInfo

**Instance Property**

The user info for the migration manager.

## Declaration

```swift
var userInfo: [AnyHashable : Any]? { get set }
```

## Discussion

You can use the user info dictionary to aid the customization of your migration process.

## Customizing the Manager

- **usesStoreSpecificMigrationManager**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the migration manager tries to use a store specific migration manager to perform the  migration.
